title: Pool Skimmer Door, For Hayward 8926 Skimmer Replacement Weir Door Flap Above Ground Swimming Pool Skimmer Door Weir Flap
features: *Sponge Filter Technology: This pool skimmer door flap uses a sponge-like material to filter out impurities and garbage from your pool water. It has a door flap that keeps the dirt and debris inside, so they don't pollute your pool again.
*Wear-resistant and Strong: Made of high-quality PVC, our pool skimmer flapper door is wear-resistant and strong, not easy to break even after long-term use.

*Easy Installation: The pool separator cover can directly replace old and damaged ones. No complicated procedures and simple operations are required. Timely replacement of accessories can extend the life of the machine.

*Convenient to Store: The skimmer door flap replacement is compact in design and light in weight, you can easily carry it. It's lightweight and compact for easy storage in your toolbox or any tight space.

*Widely Used: The skimming weir baffle has a wide range of applications and can be used in swimming pools, spa pavilions, etc. Specifically designed for swimming pools, be sure to check the size of your existing pool cover.

*Keep your swimming pools clean and clear with this strong and durable flapper door. It connects directly, so you don't need any complicated procedures to install it. It also does not take up much space, making it ideal for any pool size and shape.
